planets.name: Here
planets.summary: Archive cluster around here: 62 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2020-03-03
artifacts.excerpt:
Several people asked me for a way to interactively explore visualizations of Twitter networks (especially with search). Here it is: https://t.co/ckxuhNnf02

Features:
- 2D and 3D
- Search
- Zoom, pan, etc
- Includes names and bios
- Multilevel communities
- Mobile (2D) https://t.co/foBeeEjDDd
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: here, any, etc, seed.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2020-08-20
artifacts.excerpt:
Visualizing relationships between senators in the 116th US Congress (current) based on cosponsorship of bills.

Full res image here:
https://t.co/Xq6WxP4uqF https://t.co/W6CQUTIcus
